scripts.dev: concurrently -n "Backend,Frontend" -c "blue,green" "npm.cmd run dev --prefix buynest-backend" "npm.cmd run dev --prefix buynest-frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm.cmd install && cd buynest-backend && npm.cmd install && cd ../buynest-frontend && npm.cmd install
scripts.build: npm.cmd run build:backend && npm.cmd run build:frontend
